# 718: Data Science {-}

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("scheduler.R")
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE, dev = "pdf")
first_day <- as.Date("2026-01-12")
cache <- F
number_of_classes <- 29
number_of_weeks <- 16
assignments_week <- 16

A_contract <- 11
B_contract <- 9
Pass_contract <- 7

A_contract_lab <- A_contract
A_contract_port <- A_contract+1

B_contract_lab <-B_contract
B_contract_port <- B_contract+1
Pass_contract_lab <-Pass_contract
Pass_contract_port <- Pass_contract+1

Midterm_checkin_min <- 5
Midterm_checkin_max <- 8
```

```{r child = './common/content/0204_datascience.Xmd'}
```
